title: Quran-MD word-level content pilot comparison
reason: Real word clips are learnable and improve character accuracy over the old content model, but held-out exact match is still 0.000. This should remain an experimental content expansion path until a larger word-level run improves exact match.

baseline.name: Existing tuned chunked baseline evaluated on Quran-MD word clips

interpretation: This is better than the approximate ayah chunk route because the audio clips are real word-level units. The remaining gap is likely scale and model/decoder strength, not fake timing noise.
next_best_step: Scale the Quran-MD word import to several thousand clips, train a word-level auxiliary content model, and then distill or mix it into the current tuned chunked content baseline while comparing against that baseline only.
